hero.description: Software Engineer specializing in distributed systems, backend architectures, and high-throughput data pipelines.

originStory.title: Continuous Growth & Cloud Architectures
originStory.content: From transforming monolithic banking systems to process millions of transactions, to optimizing bioinformatics pipelines on Kubernetes at UofT, I strive to engineer reliable and scalable cloud-native solutions.

experience.description: Developed a cloud-native tool for pharmacogenetic analysis on Google Cloud using GKE. Reduced deployment time from 50 minutes to 3 seconds with Cloud Code and Skaffold.
Mentored student teams on Java and Python software design, OOD, and testing. Led lab sessions on C programming and systems-level development.

Led a team of six in an agile project. Migrated a monolithic application to a containerized microservices architecture. Engineered a real-time data push notification pipeline for 300,000+ daily events.

education.degree: Master of Engineering in Electrical and Computer Engineering

education.institution: Rutgers, The State University of New Jersey
education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Management Information System

interests.title: Invention
interests.subtitle: Flexible Portable Yogurt Fermentation Device
interests.description: Patented a flexible portable yogurt fermentation device (CN201721005435.0). Applying engineering problem-solving to everyday challenges with practical innovations.
